analysis.name: Tradoor
analysis.summary: TRADOOR近期价格大幅下跌，24小时跌幅约1%，7日跌幅约3%，30日跌幅约23%。此前曾因鲸鱼交易和Robinhood上线传闻出现剧烈波动，但随后暴跌。当前市值约606万美元，流动性约64万美元，交易量较大但价格疲软。项目基本面尚可，但代币供应量极大（最大供应80亿），且处于早期阶段，风险较高。

recommendation.invalidation: 价格跌破0.3美元或流动性进一步下降

catalysts: Binance Futures上线永续合约（2025年9月）
Telegram Wallet预集成，潜在用户基础
NDMM交易所概念，差异化竞争

latestNews.title: TRADOOR’s 900% surge ends in a 90% crash – What’s going on?
latestNews.reason: 显示价格操纵风险，暴涨后暴跌，市场信心受损

latestNews.title: TRADOOR (TRADOOR) 24-hour amplitude at 1155.5%: Massive crash follows whale pump and surge in DEX volume
latestNews.reason: 鲸鱼拉盘后砸盘，波动极大，散户风险高

latestNews.title: Binance Futures Will Launch USDⓈ-Margined ASTERUSDT and TRADOORUSDT Perpetual Contracts (2025-09-19)
latestNews.reason: 上线主流交易所合约，增加流动性和曝光度

fundamentals: Tradoor是首个NDMM交易所，提供高达100倍杠杆的永续合约
基于TON区块链，支持Telegram Wallet，目标7亿用户
代币最大供应80亿，当前流通约1434.9万，流通率极低（约0.018%）
已上线Binance Futures，但现货仅在PancakeSwap等DEX交易
项目有Binance Alpha Spotlight和Wallet IDO背景
marketRead: 当前价格0.4224美元，远低于ATH 9.98美元（跌幅95.7%）
24小时交易量约261万美元，流动性仅64万美元，滑点风险高
价格处于下行趋势，30日跌幅超23%，无明显反弹迹象
此前曾因传闻暴涨暴跌，显示市场操纵痕迹
risks: 代币供应量极大，未来解锁压力巨大
流动性低，容易受大额交易影响价格
价格历史波动剧烈，存在操纵风险
项目处于早期，合约风险和市场风险并存
新闻多为旧闻，缺乏近期实质性利好
watchlist: 关注是否有新的CEX上线公告
监控链上大额转账和持仓变化
观察价格是否企稳，成交量是否放大
留意项目方是否有新的合作或产品更新
sourceNotes: 数据来源为CoinGecko和DexScreener，新闻来自Google News聚合
部分新闻日期较早，可能已过时
流动性数据为PancakeSwap单一池，可能不全面

profile.name: Tradoor
profile.description: Tradoor is the industry’s first NDMM exchange - using smart math and safety measures to allow people to trade with confidence - protecting traders, LPs, and the protocol from unexpected market changes. Tradoor offers up to 100x leverage on its Bitcoin and Ethereum Perpetuals, designed with advanced mathematics to ensure scientific pricing, thus protecting traders, liquidity providers (LPs), and the protocol itself. Risk control of liquidation for both traders and LPs, alongside a battle-tested Auto Deleveraging (ADL) system, acting as a fail-safe for extreme market conditions. This ensures the protocol remains free from counterparty risk and maintains insolvency resistance. Tradoor is available on multiple platforms, providing complete trading functionality on any device. Telegram's Wallet is pre-integrated for easy on-boarding for over 700 million users. Tradoor is a safe, efficient, and cost-effective decentralized finance app, utilizing The Open Network (TON) blockchain's capabilities for mass adoption via fast finality, sub-cent gas fees, and massive scalability.
